items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: And… done!

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: ...Mmm, what a lovely photo! The sunlight's perfect today. Everyone looks so happy.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Alright, hand me your Terminal. I'll help organize all the pictures and get everything uploaded and submitted.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Let's see… I'll just rename the files, add location and date, a quick caption…

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Check portrait permissions, select "Time Capsule Delivery," and tag the event theme…

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: There! Upload complete!

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: And with that, your submission is officially part of the Light Chaser Collection.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: On graduation day, everyone who appeared in your photos—and of course, you, the one who captured these moments—will all receive your own time capsules.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Hmm, but who knows? By then, you might be somewhere far away, doing something incredible.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Oh! Your rewards should process soon. Royalties, and of course, credits. Everything that was promised.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: As for the extra goodies I prepared—

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: I've got bread, instant noodles, and jelly cups! Pick one!

options.text: Only kids have to make choices. I want them all.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Eh?! All of them?!

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Fine! A full snack bundle it is! Here, hold tight!

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: But, um… besides those, there's something else I wanted to give you. Something a bit more… "personal."
She pulls out a small envelope from her shoulder bag. Its corners are a little worn, but the cover is pristine...

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Yep, a senior passed it down to me when I first joined the fan club.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: Back then, I used to listen to this album while sorting through submissions for the very first Light Chaser Collection with everyone.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: And later, the night before our seniors graduated, we borrowed the Academy's broadcast room and played this song over the speakers for the whole campus.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: I still remember. The wind was so strong, and all the photos fluttered in the sunlight. Everyone in them was smiling so brightly…

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: …I think that might be what "youth" looks like in its purest form.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: {PlayerName}, I'm entrusting this record to you now.

items.speaker: Lianna
items.text: I hope it keeps you company in the days ahead, and that it sings along with you through all the shining, beautiful moments to come.
